name: AMC ENTERTAINMENT HOLDINGS, INC.
business: AMC Entertainment Holdings, Inc. is principally involved in the theatrical exhibition business and owns, operates or has interests in theatres located in the United States and Europe. Its revenues are generated primarily from box office admissions and food and beverage sales.

exposures.sentence: We are the world s largest theatrical exhibition company and an industry leader in innovation and operational excellence.

catalysts.event: Expanded partnership with IMAX for 14 new locations and 68 system updates to be completed by 2033
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we agreed to an expanded partnership with IMAX for 14 new locations and 68 system updates to be completed by 2033.

catalysts.event: Expanded partnership with Dolby to add 40 new Dolby Cinema at AMC locations by the end of 2029
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we agreed to an expanded partnership with Dolby to add 40 new Dolby Cinema at AMC locations by the end of 2029.

catalysts.event: Deploy 10 SCREENX locations in the U.S. with targeted completion in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We have agreed to deploy 10 SCREENX locations in the U.S. with targeted completion in 2026.

catalysts.event: Deploy five 4DX locations in the U.S. with targeted completion in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We have agreed to deploy five 4DX locations in the U.S. with targeted completion in 2026.

catalysts.event: Laser at AMC: install 3,500 projectors expected to be completed by 2026
catalysts.sentence: The initial agreement to install 3,500 projectors is expected to be completed by 2026, with 2,951 installations completed as of December 31, 2025.

catalysts.event: Launched a financing transaction to refinance the New Term Loans and Odeon Notes due 2027
catalysts.sentence: On February 17, 2026, we launched a financing transaction (the Financing Transaction ) to refinance the New Term Loans and Odeon Notes due 2027 (in each case as defined herein).

tamClaims.claim: North American box office revenues were approximately $8.9 billion for 2025
tamClaims.sentence: Preliminary estimates indicate that North American box office revenues were approximately $8.9 billion for 2025, up approximately 1.5% compared with 2024.
